name: COISD - Vendor construction agreement
description: Standard base construction contract with escalation clause Section 4.2 and auto-renew Section 8.1.

name: COISD - Change order addendum
description: Change order rollup addendum. Sums individual CO line items.

name: COISD - Escalation addendum
description: Fires when BLS construction index breaches 4.5% threshold. Tiered 4-6% at 4%, 6-8% at 6%, 8+% at 8% cap.

name: COISD - Letter of intent
description: Non-binding LOI for follow-on phase engagements. Draft only until board ratification of prior phase.
